audio_log: No, I didn't say record. So the first step...
The first step is to replace the lamp coil.
So this you have to touch the untainted metal surface.
The next step is to remove.
So, to remove the existing memory module,
press the clips on the sides
The click mechanism will push the memory modules up.
Now we are going to take all of them, one by one.
We are going to put the mortise back.
So, you have to find the...
I'm going to use both hands and slide it in here.
I have to hear the peak sound.
Now you have to close the box, I mean, you have to close both of these.
